title: Operator autocycle plan surfaces arbitrary-source proof bundle status
problem: Ticket-268 added arbitrary_source_proof_bundle_status to operator_loop plan mode, but operator_autocycle plan does not expose the same proof bundle readiness for bounded autocycle operators.
acceptance_criteria: operator_autocycle --mode plan includes arbitrary_source_proof_bundle_status mirroring operator_loop.
No live LLM or live_network changes.
rollback_plan: Revert autocycle plan fields and tests.
